Security camera footage shows an unarmed man with shaven head, able to seemingly kill people with a simple touch. Police investigation leads to the suspected identity of the murderer: middle-aged man named Tarō Yamada. When the police conduct a search of his apartment, they find the rotting corpse of a woman.  Adapted from Sato Jiro's own debut manga.

title: Sarpanch
overview: Dev Kharoud

title: Matador Bolero
overview: New York nightclub, The Matador, becomes the site of a high-profile murder that attracts the attention of an obsessive detective, a TV news reporter, and an elusive being living outside the realms of time and space. Their stories converge with that of a new-age cult operating at the command of an ultra-intelligent supercomputer named Bolero.

title: Pick-Up 52
overview: 52 Pick Up is a comedy thriller about two young men, who form their relationship inside an apartment building, searching behind every door to uncover the truth. The first young man is a quirky P.I., whose job is synonymous with his life. After his terrible disappointment from a failed case, he persistently searches for the reason for his failure. Once he finds it, he decides to follow him to the apartment building of the other young man, Mitsos. Mitsos is an idle car mechanic, working in his father's business. His carefree life is turned upside down when a daily puzzle outside his own door seems to be trying to shake him up strongly. Through an allegory, audio documents, a pineapple juice, a near encounter with radishes, a key and a harlequin, Mitsos is called upon to keep his cool and untangle the tangle - always for his own good.

title: Mystic Melodies Reprise
overview: Seeking escape from the walls that keep her trapped, Aliki turns to the hidden and dangerous world of music. A story taken from the half-forgotten remains of a film that was never released.

title: BLOODLINE: HUNT OR BE HUNTED
overview: When revenge leaves a trail of bodies behind him, fugitive Tommy Crane is hunted by detectives, bounty hunters, and the very criminal empire he tried to destroy—making him go from the hunter to the prey.

title: Vertiginous
overview: Jacques goes to his friend Bruno's house to tell him some big news: the entire human race is living in a simulation...

title: True Justice Eye For An Eye
overview: Amateur sleuths tackle a fresh challenge at a local school, diving into the fierce world of parent politics. Their investigation uncovers hidden agendas and unexpected alliances as they navigate the complex web within the community.

title: ALLOY OF FEAR
overview: Rafael, filled with anxiety, heads to a secluded spot in the forest, where he encounters a group of masked men. There, he hands over the murder weapon and Amalia's braid as evidence. In exchange, the leader, a man in a clown mask, gives him a suitcase of drugs and a new gun—a mission Rafael cannot bear to undertake. When he refuses, the clown threatens him that if he does not obey, his family will pay the price. The mental burden becomes unbearable. Later, the masked men discuss the events of the day, unaware that Rafael, unable to bear it any longer, has ended his life.

title: Wound
overview: Hermetically sealed and sunk in non-chronological qualities of time, the experience of the wound is always relived torturously, quoting a series of dualities: immobility-movement, inactivity-activity, absence-presence, alienation-proximity, pain-pleasure. Seven long takes represent the wound as something that probably pre-exists and then takes place in an (anti-)erotic situation.

title: Saligia
overview: After the apocalypse on Earth, seven people find themselves in an unknown space without any memories of who they are, or how they got there. One of them is convinced that they are all in her dream, from which she is trying to wake up by all means.

title: What did you do to him?
overview: Life in a shelter for abused women is a daily challenge of adjustment and rediscovery of identity. In this documentary, I focus on the life of a woman who found herself in such a situation, trying to break free from the cycle of violence and regain her hope and self-esteem. The film highlights her unique journey, capturing the strength of mutual support and solidarity that she experiences within the shelter, as well as the difficulties she faces in her effort to adapt to her new reality.

title: One Night Stand
overview: When the low-key Alkis follows his much more outgoing best friend Sofia to a university dance party, it seems like this might be the night their relationship will develop into something more than friendship. Until, at least, Alkis' unexpected encounter with the enigmatic, provocative Sini puts an end to these expectations and leads the two friends to a rift. But what seems like a bitter ending is only the first step towards a hedonistic, psychedelic and violent evening...

title: The Strange Adventures of Inspector Dulac, Part 8: The Mystery of the Lost Hortensia
overview: Inspector Leonard Dulac, once a world-famous detective, now washed up and broke, is hired by a rich old lady to find her missing cat; he gradually unearths a dark conspiracy behind the case, finding that it all leads back to his past.

title: Driving Me Crazy
overview: Nina knows why her grandfather hates her – obviously because she’s a lesbian. Time to come clean. In the weirdest car ride of their lives, Nina and Stathis will have to finally talk to each other whether they like it or not.

title: Ink Between the Lines
overview: After the devastating suicide of her best friend Coli, 15 year old Natalie turns to journaling to cope with her overwhelming grief. Struggling with guilt and isolation, she pours her emotions onto the page and joins a support group for teens. A deep conversation with Ezra, a friend who understands silent pain, inspires her to transform her journal entries into a novel. As Natalie writes, she begins to confront hidden truths about her friendship with Coli, unspoken struggles, and the weight of what was left unsaid. Through storytelling, she finds healing, connection, and the courage to speak the truth—not just for herself, but for others who need to hear it.

title: FISHCALL
overview: 18-year-old Ellie is preparing for a big step in her life, to leave her parents' house to study, but fear holds her back and drowns her. The step for Ellie is taken by her childhood imaginary friend, a fish, reminding her of the reason she must move forward. Ellie hesitates but the next step, the realization of the truth and the acceptance of her adult self, is a one-way street.

title: Clara
overview: Clara takes care of the bedridden Nitsa, who is gradually losing her sanity. Between them, in a relationship that begins with need and daily wages, a tender language of their own develops.

title: Shocktopus
overview: An alien amoeba crashes to Earth and mutates aquatic life along the shores of North Carolina, unleashing an electrified octopus that terrorizes a seaside resort. Two special operatives try to stop the shock wave of cosmic carnage.

title: Golden Bullet
overview: A crime thriller story set in Serbia.

title: Tayo sa Wakas
overview: A story about a bumpy relationship.

title: Children of Heaven
overview: Two siblings, Ali and Zahra, who agreed to keep the matter of Zahra's missing shoes a secret, which Ali had brought in for repair. To solve the problem, they decided to share Ali's worn-out shoes. Zahra would wear them in the morning during her school schedule, and after returning home, she would run as fast as she could so Ali could wear them to school in the afternoon. New hope emerged when Ali learned of an inter-school running competition with a prize of a pair of shoes for the third-place winner. Ali signed up, determined to win the competition so he could buy Zahra new shoes.

title: Strung
overview: A talented violinist whose prestigious new role as a music tutor for an enigmatic, elite family spirals into a psychological battle for her safety and sanity.

title: Rao Bahadur
overview: A demon haunts a mansion in the 1970s as India changes and the aristocracy fades.

title: Mata
overview: Wounded while on a clandestine operation in Niger, French secret agent Mata loses track of her colleague Antoine, captured on the spot. Upon her return, she volunteers for a counter-espionage mission in the Alps, with the intuition that this new assignment might somehow be connected to her traumatic mission in Africa. Haunted by Antoine’s captivity and convinced that her managers are hiding information from her, Mata embarks on a race against time, outside any official framework... at the risk of losing everything.

title: Five Friends 2: Mount Klawih
overview: Three years after climbing Mount Madyopuro, the five friends' friendship has grown stronger. When they reunite for Andrew's daughter's birthday, they witness the family threatened with becoming a sacrifice for a black magic ritual! They set off to accompany Andrew to Mount Klawih. However, Juna has disappeared into the realm of demons!

title: Dance of the Damned
overview: Darso, a clown busker, lost his wife and unborn child to thug violence. In grief, he brought his wife's body back to his village. However, the village is in chaos due to a conflict with an evil developer and a curse ritual that summons dark forces. Darso is also caught up in the evil forces connected to the person he loves most.

title: Crescendo
overview: Behind the scenes of an ambitious staging of the opera The Marriage of Figaro, an accusation of sexual assault emerges, upsetting the balance of the cast. The film explores the tensions linked to generational conflicts and individual stances, in an artistic context in crisis.

title: Khan Tumhara
overview: A genre blend of action sequences with romance and drama, centering on the character Yusuf Khan, described as navigating power, love and vengeance.

title: It’s All Good
overview: After taking care of his intrusive mother for years, Elie is relieved: she is cured. He can finally focus on his own life and falls in love… until his mom’s relapse. Now he has to take care of both the women in his life!

title: Keu Bole Biplobi, Keu Bole Dakat
overview: A biopic of Ananta Singha. Some calls him dacoit, some calls him a rebellion. This adaptation gives the viewer a chance to know him as a whole, a person and as a revolutionary communist leader.

title: To the Tooth
overview: Artie is a young Italian chef who runs a bistro that used to be owned by her father. When the dead body of an ex-mafioso appears in the restaurant, Artie must re-evaluate her relationship with both L'Atessa and the people in it.

title: What's the Story, Wishbone?
overview: A behind-the-scenes journey into the creation and lasting legacy of Wishbone, the Emmy-winning PBS series that introduced a generation to classic literature through the adventures of a small dog with a big imagination.

title: Penny in the Sky
overview: When a man contemplating his life decides to put his fate into a coin toss, he's interrupted by the sudden appearance of a woman there to end her life as well. Now they both find themselves at a crossroads, life and death decided by heads or tails.

title: Suamiku Lukaku
overview: Amina, a mother living with domestic violence, struggles to protect her terminally ill child. Her husband appears kind on the outside, but is cruel at home. Hope emerges when she meets a lawyer willing to help her, but the path to freedom is fraught with risk and great sacrifice.

title: Backrooms
overview: A strange doorway appears in the basement of a furniture showroom.

title: 7 Dogs
overview: Interpol agent Khalid Al-Azzazi joins forces with Ghali Abu Dawood from the 7 Dogs crime syndicate to fight drug trafficking.

title: Roid
overview: A solitary middle aged man marries a madwoman and builds a house on a vacant plot of land far from the village. However, his wife’s madness becomes a calamity in his tranquil life.

title: The Death of Robin Hood
overview: Grappling with his past after a life of crime and murder, Robin Hood finds himself gravely injured after a battle he thought would be his last. In the hands of a mysterious woman, he is offered a chance at salvation.

title: Pressure
overview: In the tense 72 hours before D-Day, and the fate of the free world hanging in the balance, General Dwight D. Eisenhower and Captain James Stagg face an impossible choice—launch the largest and most dangerous seaborne invasion in history or risk losing the war altogether.

title: The Breadwinner
overview: After his wife Katie lands a once-in-a-lifetime deal on Shark Tank that takes her on a prolonged business trip - lifelong breadwinner Nate Wilcox now has to fend for his family as a first-time stay-at-home dad.

title: Unur, Fama u Glorja
overview: A former boxing coach lives through tragedy that unfolds after an injury involving his son during a championship fight.

title: Susana and Elvira, The Movie
overview: Susana and Elvira, two former best friends, reunite after two years apart to organize the celebrity wedding of the year.

title: National Theatre Live: The Playboy of the Western World
overview: Nicola Coughlan (Bridgerton) joins Éanna Hardwicke (The Sixth Commandment) and Siobhán McSweeney (Derry Girls) in John Millington Synge’s riveting play of youth and self-discovery.  Pegeen Flaherty’s life is turned upside down when a young man walks into her pub claiming that he’s killed his father. Instead of being shunned, the killer becomes a local hero and begins to win hearts, that is until a second man unexpectedly arrives on the scene…  Filmed live on stage at the National Theatre, Caitríona McLaughlin directs this darkly funny tale full to the brim with secrets.

title: Tod meiner Jugend
overview: A janitor with a loving wife and a devoted son leads a seemingly quiet, orderly life. One day, the boy asks his father an inconspicuous but profound question: “Dad, why are there no photos of you at my age?” Driven by a restlessness that can no longer be suppressed, the man returns to the place of his childhood: a children's home he has avoided for decades.

title: Born to Fake
overview: In 1996, one of the biggest media scandals in German history shook the public: Michael Born, a self-made journalist, had faked over twenty reports for the newly established private television station between 1990 and 1996. Some seemed amateurish, others dealt with absurd topics: child labor for IKEA in India, drug addicts licking toads to get high, and the Ku Klux Klan in the Eifel region were just some of his numerous fabrications. How did it come to this? Was Michael Born an enlightened figure who subversively exposed the tabloid system, a victim of the system, or simply a bumbling fraud? Film traces Michael Born's footsteps. Put together from hundreds of hours of raw material and the memories of former companions, an incredible story of forgery emerges. A media-theoretical film about levels of reality, fake news, and the question: Why do we actually believe what we see?

title: How to Save the Immortal. The Mystery of Living Water
overview: Three hundred years of Koshchey's search for a chosen one have finally been crowned with success, and preparations for the wedding with Varvara are in full swing. However, his cherished dream will not come true so easily, and now Koshchey, along with the Good fellow Elisha and Kolobok, embarks on a dangerous journey to save his beloved.

title: Polong
overview: Maria Hadi tried to seek forgiveness before she died, but her defense team vented their grudge against the innocent heir.

title: Copan
overview: A microcosm of everything Brazil stands for: the good, the bad and the ugly. This immersive and intimate portrait of the largest residential building in Latin America and its inhabitants shines a light on a country being torn apart by corruption, populism, polarized politics and a collapsing democracy.

title: Haunted Universities 4
overview: The tales from four regions of Thailand. Stories handed down "from generation to generation" still told to this day: North – Northeast – Central – South.

title: The Furious
overview: When YouTuber-boxer Danial insults their late father's name, brothers Firdaus and Hakim reunite - one fighting for redemption, the other for revenge - in a battle that will decide not just who wins, but what remains of The Furious legacy.

title: In Case We Never Meet Again
overview: Amid the war in Ukraine, Tanya and Zenit’s fragile love story unfolds, stretched between moments of closeness and conflict. Meanwhile, a group of children play war, building block posts, and imagining futures defined by violence.

title: Abyss
overview: Dasha and Sasha are happy newlyweds. A honeymoon and a parachute jump over the foothills of Mount Elbrus should be the beginning of their new life. But fate makes its own adjustments. The pilot turns out to be Artyom, Dasha's ex, whom she didn't even want to remember. When the plane crashes, the three of them have to jump without preparation. The slings get tangled. They miraculously stay alive — but find themselves suspended over a mountain precipice in the midst of raging forest fires. Dasha finds herself between two men, with each of whom her life is connected. One is the present. The other is the unhealed past.

title: White Agbada
overview: Ibironke, a Nigerian-American woman whose life is stagnant, engages in self-destructive behaviors to cope. Her concerned sister calls her one day to propose a family trip to Nigeria for spiritual assistance. Ibironke is totally against this and continues to engage in her bad habits—including a casual relationship with an engaged prospective business partner who has a baby on the way. When their post-sex discussion accelerates into a fight, an ancestor who has dropped Easter eggs throughout her day appears in her mirror, terrifying her. She immediately knows this climactic sighting is a radical call for change.

title: The White Rabbit
overview: Bird, a rescue worker, reunites with Eve, his ex-girlfriend who is now a writer. This time, she returns with a mysterious short story whose certain details strangely coincide with the enigmatic death case in a particular house.

title: The Furious
overview: After the daughter of Wang Wei is kidnapped by a criminal network and he receives no help from the corrupt police, Wei sets out on a rampage to find her himself. His only ally is Navin – a relentless journalist whose wife has mysteriously disappeared. Fueled by a furious vengeance, the unlikely duo ruthlessly fights against the kidnappers in this explosive martial arts showdown.

title: Sheep in the Box
overview: Set in the near future, Otone Komoto works as an architect. She is married to Kensuke Komoto, who runs a construction company. The married couple decide to welcome a humanoid robot into their home as their son.

title: Power Ballad
overview: When Rick, a past-his-prime wedding singer, meets fading boy-band star Danny during a gig, the two bond over music and a late-night jam session. But when Danny turns one of Rick’s songs into the hit that reignites his career, Rick sets out to reclaim the recognition he believes he deserves - even if it means risking everything he cares about.

title: Mononoke the Movie: Chapter III - The Curse of the Serpent
overview: Peace returns to Edo Castle's Ooku, but ominous signs persist. The Medicine Seller uncovers the origins of a deadly conspiracy rooted in a 150-year-old secret involving the Ooku's creation, ancient grudges, and hidden truths. He faces the powerful serpent god, embodying the Ooku's dark history, risking everything to stop it.

title: Moss & Freud
overview: Supermodel Kate Moss embarks on a journey of self-discovery when acclaimed artist Lucian Freud offers to paint her portrait.

title: That Burning House
overview: At Home of Happiness, a devoted social worker struggles to reform troubled youth while the institution falls into crisis. A bullied boy clings to his late mother’s teddy bear as his world collapses. A former resident, lured into a telecom scam, faces a moral dilemma that threatens his life. Across different paths, each must confront the scars of the past and decide whether to fall into darkness or fight for a way forward.

title: Nothing Personal
overview: Lina, a well-known TV host, appears at Pedro’s doorstep to confront him about a cruel message he posted about her online. What begins as a showdown soon turns into an awkward living arrangement that quietly reshapes them both.

title: Forastera
overview: Cata will see her summer vacation disrupted by the absurd and sudden death of her grandmother, which only she witnesses. Her grief shifts when she casually turns to play pretend, transforming into the deceased. What begins with a game of dress-up will blur the lines of reality and family roles.

title: Our Land
overview: Through organised 'mass trespass' events, the Right to Roam movement sets out to increase public access to nature, but finds itself in conflict with England's landowners.

title: Daydream
overview: A young adult recounts childhood memories involving his 6th grade teacher and the lessons she taught, particularly her unconventional assignment: to daydream.

title: Phera
overview: Two men share a house and a past that no longer fits them. As city life pulls Priyam forward and age holds his father Pannalal in place, an unexpected return forces them to confront their differences and the quiet truths they have avoided.

title: Tokyo Burst
overview: Japanese remake of South Korean film "The Outlaws"(2017)

title: Mallorca Confidential
overview: Mallorca, 2007: Chusa is the powerful, self-made matriarch of Son Canal, the epicenter of drug trafficking on the island. A real estate development project threatens her power and her empire. Her niece, Nela, freshly released from prison, discovers a dark secret about Chusa that puts her loyalty at risk. As violence escalates, Nela has only two options: loyalty or freedom.

title: Phool Pishi O Edward
overview: In a zamindar household, a watchful aunt becomes the quiet witness to a mystery that slowly exposes injustice.

title: Pig That Survived Foot-and-Mouth Disease
overview: A pig wanting to be a human is ready to give it his all, whatever the cost. A human wanting to be an animal is ready to give up everything.

title: New Neighbors Association
overview: A newfound HOA sprouts in an existing neighborhood haunting an unsuspecting family.

title: A Man Worth Killing
overview: After a series of brutal murders, and orders from The Big Boss, two callous and cold killers continue their bloodshed, only wanting to eliminate a weak old man, who is actually their biggest obstacle, but also a great threat to their unscrupulous plan.

title: Runner
overview: Cris dedicates herself body and soul to athletics. While preparing for the 800-meter race at the Spanish National Championships, she suffers a severe psychotic break brought on by mounting pressure. As recovery unfolds, Cris keeps her eyes fixed on the track, holding on to the dream that has always defined.

title: Borley Rectory: The Awakening
overview: In 1900, young Reverend Henry Bull and his sister, Kitty, are tasked with taking over the duties of their family home in Essex, a majestic Victorian mansion built on the site of an old monastery. Unaware of the sinister forces that lurk within, the pair are soon confronted by terrifying paranormal activities that threaten their loved ones. Desperate to protect themselves from the demonic intrusion, they call upon the services of a trusted family friend to investigate the origins of the vengeful ghosts which haunt their property. But these are spirits who will not rest, and Borley Rectory is doomed to gain a chilling reputation, as the most haunted house in all of Britain.

title: The Lounge
overview: Liz begins changing into a lizard when she has to choose between making art or making her boss happy.

title: To Wander the Earth
overview: Redmond, who was raised intensely Catholic, struggles to cope with the loss of his religion throughout different stages of life, constantly seeking penitential fire through masochistic means.

title: Nightmares Unleashed 2: Joseph's Revenge
overview: The Nightmare Never Ends as Raven must face her nightmares one last time, however Joseph knows how she is and is pulling out all the stops this time to finally claim his prize...Raven herself.

title: Spirits Talk
overview: A grieving woman’s reality and memories begin to blur as her adoptive mother, Mother Nikki, reaches out to her from the spirit realm. She must speak to her mother one last time—or risk losing the ability to love herself and others.

title: Haunted Harmony Mysteries: Key to the Castle
overview: When a ghost hunter show comes to town, it's up to Gethsemane and Eamon to solve the unexpected murder of the host, allowing the brand-new spirit to cross-over.

title: Me in a Nutshell
overview: A dimwitted yet curious creature gets stuck in a nutshell and does everything in his power to break out.

title: STOP THE WORLD I WANT TO GET OFF
overview: The complex relationship between parent and child from childhood to adulthood has affected Florence's life in unthinkable ways.  She must now navigate whether to sever ties for good...or whether to give her father another chance.

title: Indian 3: War Mode
overview: Banished by the very people who sought his return to end corruption, Senapathy's two track mission converges into a single track as he takes upon eradicating corruption into his own hands.

title: Revolutionary America
overview: The story of the American Founding, the greatest political achievement in history. The American colonists had developed a unique way of life as they practiced self-government for 150 years. In the struggles between the colonies and the mother country that followed the French and Indian War, Britain declared that Americans had no right to rule themselves. This went against everything the Americans knew. In response, our ancestors risked their “lives, fortunes, and sacred honor” to fight the War for Independence. Against all odds, they won, and in victory formed a stable, lasting republic.
